name: Abdomen CT With Contrast - Kidneys
description: Abdomen CT with contrast focused on renal evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the abdomen and pelvis with intravenous contrast was performed.

sections.name: Right Kidney
sections.content: Right kidney: [Measures __ cm in length / No hydronephrosis / No renal mass identified / No perinephric stranding]. Corticomedullary differentiation [is preserved / normal].

sections.name: Left Kidney
sections.content: Left kidney: [Measures __ cm in length / No hydronephrosis / No renal mass identified / No perinephric stranding]. Corticomedullary differentiation [is preserved / normal].

sections.name: Adrenal Glands
sections.content: Right adrenal: [normal / no mass]. Left adrenal: [normal / no mass]. No adrenal nodule identified.

sections.name: Ureters
sections.content: Both ureters [are not dilated / no evidence of obstruction]. No calculus identified in the ureter.

sections.name: Bladder
sections.content: The bladder [is adequately distended / shows no wall thickening / no filling defect]. No mass identified.

impression:
1. [No renal mass or hydronephrosis / Both kidneys unremarkable].
